summary: M315 — Deep balance analysis + rebalance pass: Act 5 combat was trivial (party one-shotting all enemies, 0 retaliation). Fixed simulator act-as-ng+ bug and class-casing bug. Rebalanced all enemies Act 1-5 (HP +30-100%, DMG +30-60%), capped Backstab damageMult and Reality Shard stun chance, raised global damage multiplier to 1.3x.
